name: Tracing Beam
description: A Beam that follows the path of an SVG as the user scrolls. Adjusts beam length with scroll speed.
animation_description: A beam of light traces along a vertical path as user scrolls down the page. Beam follows scroll progress with glowing head and fading trail.
